speaker: Brené Brown
episode_or_content_title: Braving the Wilderness: The Quest for True Belonging and the Courage to Stand Alone

"Braving the Wilderness" (2017) is a real, official, widely cited book published by Random House. Source URL is the official brenebrown.com book page.
